### docker0
driver: bridge
version: 2.3
firmware-version: N/A
expansion-rom-version: 
bus-info: N/A
supports-statistics: no
supports-test: no
supports-eeprom-access: no
supports-register-dump: no
supports-priv-flags: no

### eth0
driver: macb
version: 6.8.0-1053-raspi
firmware-version: 
expansion-rom-version: 
bus-info: 1f00100000.ethernet
supports-statistics: yes
supports-test: no
supports-eeprom-access: no
supports-register-dump: yes
supports-priv-flags: no

### tailscale0
driver: tun
version: 1.6
firmware-version: 
expansion-rom-version: 
bus-info: tun
supports-statistics: no
supports-test: no
supports-eeprom-access: no
supports-register-dump: no
supports-priv-flags: no

### wlan0
driver: brcmfmac
version: 7.45.234
